title: artemisia simplex
intro: Artemisia simplex, also known as Qing Hao, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Artemisia simplex include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating malaria, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in modern medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
